calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-31-2024 is admitted to probate. James Chinmin Lee is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filling either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq is set for Aug-04-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by two weeks prior, no appearance will be necessary.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Continued To Jul-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
